# Angelo & Giovanna Wedding Website

This is a Next.js wedding website for Angelo and Giovanna featuring:
- Modern responsive design
- Wedding photo galleries
- Location details and maps
- QR code integration for guest photo uploads to Google Drive
- Elegant typography and animations

## Development Guidelines
- Use modern React hooks and functional components
- Implement responsive design with Tailwind CSS
- Follow accessibility best practices
- Optimize images and performance for mobile devices
- Use Italian language for content
- Maintain elegant, romantic styling throughout

## Features to implement:
1. ✅ Homepage with wedding title and main photo
2. About section with couple's story
3. Location details with embedded maps
4. Photo gallery for pre-wedding photos
5. Guest photo upload system with QR code
6. RSVP functionality (future)
7. Event timeline and details

## Current Status
The basic homepage is complete with:
- Elegant header with couple names
- Placeholder for main wedding photo
- Navigation buttons for future sections
- Responsive design with romantic color palette
- Development server running on http://localhost:3000
